explorer.fileNesting.patterns.deploy.md: .gitignore, ecosystem.config.*, deploy*, swap.sh, cleanup_old.sh, update.sh, blue-green-deploy.sh, verify-deployment.sh, .dockerignore,docker-compose.yml, Dockerfile*, *.tar
explorer.fileNesting.patterns.next.config.*: components.json, postcss.config.*, tailwind.config.*, .vercelignore, mdx-components.tsx, proxy.ts, server.ts
explorer.fileNesting.patterns.package.json: package-lock.json, nodemon.json, pnpm*, .yarnrc*, yarn*, bun.lock, turbo.json, .eslint*, eslint*,  .oxlint*, oxlint*, .prettier*,  prettier*, .editorconfig, .npmrc, drizzle.config.ts, auth-schema.ts
explorer.fileNesting.patterns.README.md: CHANGELOG.md, LICENSE, CONTRIBUTING.md, CODE_OF_CONDUCT.md, SECURITY.md, readme.*, *.http, *.rest
